title: selliguea phuluangensis
intro: Selliguea phuluangensis, also known as Phuluang fern or Phuluang plant, is a type of fern species native to Thailand. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Selliguea phuluangensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its role in supporting immune function and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional Thai medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
